search_terms_used: low intensity training endurance adaptations mitochondrial density fat oxidation aerobic base pubmed review
active recovery running physiology vs passive rest exercise recovery pubmed
easy running zone 1 training volume endurance performance adaptations pubmed
zone 2 training endurance adaptations mitochondria physiological mechanisms 2023 2024 2025 review
Achten Jeukendrup 2004 fat oxidation exercise intensity crossover point endurance pubmed
Dudley Abraham Terjung 1982 influence exercise intensity duration biochemical adaptations skeletal muscle pubmed
coverage_notes: Good coverage of why easy running works: intensity-duration interaction for mitochondrial adaptation (Dudley 1982 foundational), fat oxidation optimization at low intensity (Achten & Jeukendrup 2004), capillary adaptations to low-intensity training (Shono 2002), metabolic adaptations over one year of aerobic training (Scharhag-Rosenberger 2010), active recovery physiology (Menzies 2010, Sánchez-Otero 2022), and modern zone 2 evidence reviews (Mølmen 2025 meta-regression, Storoschuk 2025 critical narrative review). Includes foundational animal model and recent human meta-analysis.

papers.title: Influence of exercise intensity and duration on biochemical adaptations in skeletal muscle
papers.journal: Journal of Applied Physiology: Respiratory, Environmental and Exercise Physiology
papers.notes: Examined the interaction of exercise intensity and daily duration on mitochondrial enzyme adaptations across fiber types using 19 different treadmill protocols in rats.

papers.title: Effects of low intensity aerobic training on skeletal muscle capillary and blood lipoprotein profiles
papers.notes: Examined effects of low-intensity aerobic training on skeletal muscle capillarization and lipoprotein profiles in 11 non-obese men.

papers.title: Optimizing fat oxidation through exercise and diet
papers.notes: Reviewed how exercise intensity affects fat oxidation rates, identifying maximal fat oxidation at 59-64% VO2max in trained individuals.

papers.title: Blood lactate clearance during active recovery after an intense running bout depends on the intensity of the active recovery
papers.notes: Examined blood lactate clearance at different active recovery intensities after intense running in 10 males, finding intensity-dependent clearance.

papers.title: Effects of one year aerobic endurance training on resting metabolic rate and exercise fat oxidation in previously untrained men and women. Metabolic endurance training adaptations
papers.notes: Examined metabolic adaptations including resting metabolic rate and fat oxidation changes after one year of aerobic endurance training in 17 previously untrained participants.

papers.title: Active vs. passive recovery during an aerobic interval training session in well-trained runners
papers.notes: Compared active versus passive recovery during interval training in 11 well-trained distance runners examining physiological and performance responses.

papers.title: Effects of Exercise Training on Mitochondrial and Capillary Growth in Human Skeletal Muscle: A Systematic Review and Meta-Regression
papers.notes: Systematic review and meta-regression of 353 articles (5,973 participants) examining how exercise training variables affect mitochondrial and capillary growth in human skeletal muscle.

papers.title: Much Ado About Zone 2: A Narrative Review Assessing the Efficacy of Zone 2 Training for Improving Mitochondrial Capacity and Cardiorespiratory Fitness in the General Population
papers.notes: Critically reviewed the popular endorsement of zone 2 training for mitochondrial capacity and cardiorespiratory fitness in the general population.
